rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: QBot Mounted Drive Execution (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: QBot Mounted Drive Execution (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: 949afe0b-2d45-4999-be9c-fe4808b8a68b
status: experimental
description: Detects process creation from wscript or cscript interpreters with commands
  occuring on mounted drive letters. Defenders should check whether these processes
  have child processes. Part of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/qbot/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.s0650
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    ParentImage|endswith: \explorer.exe
    Image|endswith:
    - \wscript.exe
    - \cscript.exe
    CommandLine|re: '[d-z]:\\[^\\]+\.(?:js|vbs|wsf)'
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
